scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: REACT_APP_GOOGLE_SIGNIN_CLIENT_ID="$GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID" REACT_APP_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY="${GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY:-$GOOGLE_VOICE_API_KEY}" npm run build:frontend && PORT=3000 HOST=0.0.0.0 node backend/backend-server.js
